perch_cached_probe::The probe model is the bottleneck: train soundscape ROC-AUC (0.992) vs val (0.665) reveals severe overfitting or train/val distribution gap. The Bayesian prior is paradoxically stronger on validation (0.662) than train (0.487), confirming the probe itself is the weak link. Additionally, only 52/75 classes are fitted (31% coverage deficit), which blocks submission bar criteria per 04_submission_bar.md. The immediate task is submission bundle parity and calibration, but the structural class coverage gap and probe overfitting must be addressed to improve the score meaningfully.
